programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies is the 'Taskmaster' in this game show that challenges the wit and wisdom of five comedians, who are all putting their reputations on the line. Alex Horne assists Davies in setting up unique and ridiculous tasks for the competitors.

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Country Lives
programme.desc: Susie and Bill soldier on with their barn conversion, but feel under pressure to make it liveable quickly, so that they can move in.

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Peter and Judy explore the fun side of Florida Keys, while Holly juggles medieval business and pleasure on Florida's Gulf Coast. And fire captain David puts on an Easter egg hunt.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help Lisa and Paul from East Yorkshire to find a holiday villa in the sun, big enough for their family. On the Costa Blanca, Jo and Andrew Alderton are on the hunt for a permanent Spanish home for Kevin and Debbie.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retirees Steve and Jackie want a holiday home in Guardamar del Segura, southeast Spain, to enjoy with their family and friends. Lee Juggurnauth shows them what their budget of £80k can buy.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King helps Julie and Leo find the perfect holiday home on the southern Costa Blanca for all three generations of their family to enjoy. With a maximum budget of £120,000, Leah shows them five impressive properties.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: A secret tower room spells trouble for Louisa and Roger. Tim and Rebecca have a blooming good idea for a flower retreat. Will delays leave Tim and Krys' art group brushes dry?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her dad Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in Andalucía for their budget of £50k, that all the family can use to enjoy the Spanish sunshine.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First host in Devon is 51-year-old community nurse Tina, whose menu incorporates all of her best-loved dishes: a seaside-inspired starter, a Thai main and an old favourite to finish.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the second day of this week's competition in Devon, and Essex geezer Rob is pinning his hopes on an Italian themed menu, and some artful entertainment, to land him the grand.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Third host from Devon, 43-year-old pilot, Rhys, is hoping to take the competition to new heights. Will his guests think his locally sourced menu is first class or economy.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's day four from Devon, and flexing her culinary credentials is 28-year-old HR manager Holly, with a menu inspired by her restaurant favourites.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It's the final night in Devon, and detective Steve is counting on a menu of bold flavours to win him the prize, in an evening full of fun, friction, feuding and some experimental food.

programme.title: World's Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Exploring unique and surprising hotels throughout the world with innovative features and spectacular settings, from cabins dangling from clifftops to clandestine subterranean crash pads.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In London, will Jody and Shane's million-pound budget be enough for a slice of the Big Smoke? And Kirstie gives foodies Roopal and Hershil all the ingredients for an ideal home.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Finding himself at home in Southern Italy, former operative Robert McCall soon discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall becomes their protector by taking on the mafia.

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Blanchard looks back on her first year of freedom through never-before-seen footage and faces up to the events of the past year with her eye towards her future.

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: After an emotional separation from her husband Ryan and an impulsive reconnection with Ken, her ex-fiancé, Gypsy Rose Blanchard finds herself unexpectedly expecting just six months after her release from prison.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: What do Mo Gilligan, Babatunde Aléshé, Jon Richardson, Lucy Beaumont, Fearne Cotton, Gok Wan, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Johnny Ball and other famous faces think of our top telly?

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: A definitive one-stop shop for all things cruise, bringing you the hottest destinations and the latest deals to ensure that your next cruise ship holiday is your greatest one yet.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: The Beast from the East descends, covering parts of the UK in a blanket of snow and ice and bringing some of the country's busiest roads to a standstill. Phones are ringing off the hook at as scores of drivers are left stranded on Britain's roads.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jacko and the firearms unit flush out a suspect after finding a homemade gun, while a 999 call leads to a drugs bust for Liam, and dog handler Justin sniffs out the truth when a mum and son tell some porkies over who a crashed a car.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jacko and the Firearms team are called to house where a suspected shotgun has been seen, after a short stand-off, the situation soon descends into something more sinister when the team discover what could be a home-made bomb.

programme.title: The First of the Few
programme.desc: Absorbing film biography of R J Mitchell, the designer of the Spitfire, the aircraft that enabled the Royal Air Force to defeat the might of Germany's Luftwaffe during the Battle of Britain.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: The First of the Few
programme.desc: Absorbing film biography of R J Mitchell, the designer of the Spitfire, the aircraft that enabled the Royal Air Force to defeat the might of Germany's Luftwaffe during the Battle of Britain.

programme.title: Raid on Rommel
programme.desc: A British Army intelligence officer, posing as a commando chief, leads a group of soldiers on an intentionally unsuccessful raid behind enemy lines. Once imprisoned in a POW camp, he turns his attention to escape and the aim of his assignment - to carry out a surprise attack on General Rommel's strategically placed artillery emplacements.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Raid on Rommel
programme.desc: A British Army intelligence officer, posing as a commando chief, leads a group of soldiers on an intentionally unsuccessful raid behind enemy lines. Once imprisoned in a POW camp, he turns his attention to escape and the aim of his assignment - to carry out a surprise attack on General Rommel's strategically placed artillery emplacements.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A digger has fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over, blocking one side of a busy A road. Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken down trailer back safely to its owner.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Derbyshire's finest face a series of issues with motorcyclists - with one evading them for over an hour in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A serial offender gives officers the runaround, a high-speed pursuit comes to a painful finish, the occupants of a 4x4 need rescuing after overturning on treacherous ice, and the interceptors are called on a mucky mercy mission after two of their own get caught in a sticky situation.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Angus and Sean have to smash down a door in order to save a man's life, veteran interceptor Gordon picks up a gruesome twosome on the M6, and a fleeing Land Rover rams two cop cars in a bid to get away.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: On the nightshift in Newcastle, PCs Jan Simlesa and Jamie Leslie spot a driver with his foot down in a top of the range BMW. Meanwhile, a force-wide hunt for two stolen cars leads Jan, Marc and Jamie to the seaside town of Whitley Bay.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Twenty-two year-old Steph Custance tries to complete the first ice roads mission of her career, but a crossing that's just opened pushes her to the edge.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Scully and Mulder's situation becomes increasingly dangerous when a mysterious government stranger enters the picture.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Worlds Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: Taichung Men's Prison is the biggest in Taiwan, housing some of the most dangerous criminals and operating a system of progressive correctional treatment.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Veteran trucker Yogi goes on a mercy mission for the drought ravaged farmers of New South Wales. He is leading a hay convoy.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: An 18-wheel trailer catches fire and closes 3 lanes just before rush hour; an 18-tonne lorry loses traction and smashes into a tree; a delivery truck gets stuck in the mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Super-sized transport jobs require even bigger trucks to perform them. Lifting the lid on the heavy recovery business, featuring industrial strength trucks capable of towing and lifting the biggest and heaviest machines on the nation's roads.

programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Snowplough drivers and patrols are prepared to work all day and all night to keep UK roadways clear from obstruction when winter sweeps the nation. Fearless in the face of a cold front, these men and women are there to assist when disaster strikes.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A reverse ramming sends Chris reaching for german shepherd Ronny, Lee is confronted by a particularly mouthy motorist, Liam arrests a man who denies carrying out a shocking attack, tasers are drawn after a van driver causes carnage, and a wanted man holes up in a loft and refuses to come quietly.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Interceptor Spike takes the lead against a runaway car thief in one of the most challenging pursuits ever. Liam investigates a gang of suspected drug dealers. A supposedly straightforward stop snowballs into a showdown with an aggressive youngster.

programme.title: The Way Ahead
programme.desc: A lieutenant moulds a group of British civilians into a crack fighting unit to meet Rommel's forces in North Africa.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: The Way Ahead
programme.desc: A lieutenant moulds a group of British civilians into a crack fighting unit to meet Rommel's forces in North Africa.

programme.title: The Devil's Brigade
programme.desc: A fighting unit in WWII made up of outcast Americans and disciplined Canadians is sent to Italy to attempt a dangerous mission that has been, up until now, an impossible mission to complete.

programme.title: Entertainment News On 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: The Devil's Brigade
programme.desc: A fighting unit in WWII made up of outcast Americans and disciplined Canadians is sent to Italy to attempt a dangerous mission that has been, up until now, an impossible mission to complete.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: At Crouch HQ, there is excitement in the air as the team help to make trucking superfan Chris's wedding day extra special. Also, late into the nightshift, Snod is called to recover two crashed cars from the side of the M69.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Glen rushes to help a woman trapped inside a burning car, Hayley is on patrol during `Black Eye Friday', and Ross and John are called in to help a victim who has been bound and gagged. Meanwhile, Duggie and Gareth deal with a bullock breakout, Steve gets a bad boy racer to phone his mum after misbehaving, and a motorway pursuit is bought to an abrupt end with a perfectly timed textbook shunt.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drunken driver is in the fast lane of the M6, and dog handler Glenn is given a crash course in marine rescue when he answers an emergency distress call.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: Officers race to catch a reckless joyrider who refuses to stop. As the cops close in, the suspects run for it after crashing the car and it bursts into flames.

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programme.desc: Gloucestershire police deal with the results of thousands of racegoers attending the annual festival. Drinking all day leads to trouble, and a woman is found asleep in a stranger's car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man is caught illegally selling mixed drinks to spring breakers. A woman caught two days in a row drinking underage claims she forgot to wash out her cup.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A swimmer in distress is rescued during spring break. Airbnb guests are evicted in Key West. A street performer tickles the ivories and blocks pedestrians. Bikini-clad nurses are caught with booze.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder and Scully must protect a child from a serial killer with a penchant for murdering those claiming to suffer from religious wounds.

programme.title: Behind Bars: Worlds Toughest Prisons
programme.desc: The high-security facility on the outskirts of Bucharest houses some of the most dangerous criminals, including murderers, rapists and human traffickers. Escape is near impossible.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Livestock trucker Troy Coombe comes up against severe weather and difficult passengers as he transports two ostriches to their new home.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A tractor unit and a trailer topples over into a muddy ditch; a lorry becomes trapped with its wheels buried in mud; a 44 tonne unit loses its grip on an icy road.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A recovery officer struggles after a truck ends up in a ditch where difficult conditions, the pressures of grow-ing traffic and an uncooperative truck driver complicate matters.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A massive manhunt ensues after three suspects flee onto a farm, the team raids a drugs den and officers stumble across a suspicious-looking postman.

programme.title: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car Back!
programme.desc: Following the dramatic work of recovery crews as they trace, track and tow vehicles driven illegally on Britain's roads. With access to two recovery companies, featuring the action from the moment they are called in, to the trucks arriving on scene.

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Sonia opens a salon, Wayne & Lisa explore Almunecar, and Jill rescues horses with a fundraiser. Romance, history, and animal rescue on the sunny Costa Del Sol.

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Pat's Wet Nose Day helps rescue dogs find homes. Graham and Kaye paint in Malaga, while Alix and Claire await feedback on their first apartment renovation in Spain.

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War With The Law
programme.desc: At Vauxhall, Sam is one of twenty revenue protection officers from South Western Railway involved in a major sting operation. At Southampton, Spencer is on high alert after claims two young woman who push through the barriers are being abusive.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Even though it's only just after 10am, a woman is suspected of drink-driving and traffic cop Matt Copestake is called to investigate. Traffic cop Andy Swift is on the trail of a driver who has allegedly failed to stop after a collision.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Cops are on the hunt for stolen cars, and a traffic cop ends up on a 100-mile chase down the M1. Officers pursue a stolen car being driven by a wanted prolific criminal, police in Yorkshire spot a stolen van.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: During a busy spring bank holiday, the traffic cops deal with the effects of drink and drugs. A dangerous drunk driver leads traffic cops on a 20-minute chase through busy areas; a drunk driver dangerously weaves down a busy dual carriageway.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: There is a hair-raising pursuit through the market town of Ripley which sees a driver mounting pavements, hitting cars and even colliding with an ambulance. An Interceptor has a narrow escape when an out of control driver crashes into his car. A drunk driver goes for the world record in failed breathalyser tests and the helicopter is called in when a Land Rover driver decides to take a pursuit off-road.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Eurocopter gets down and dirty in a lengthy manhunt, a vanload of villains lose control in a high speed pursuit and a drunk driver crushes his Corsa like it is a tin can. Elsewhere, a speed freak thinks he can outrun the law, there is aggravation and abuse on Derbyshire's mean streets and the interceptors facing off against an eight legged enemy.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A horsebox carries an illegal load, one of the team's top cars becomes a victim of a drink-driver and a road user gets a lesson in how to transport children safely.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: A bus passenger's bid for compensation unravels after suspicious CCTV footage, while digital data embedded in photographs exposes a £35,000 jewellery claim as a complete fabrication. (S2 Ep19)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Over coffee, Remi apologises to Eden - she was right that he does tend to self-sabotage.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: David introduces Cash to the station's newest recruit: Probationary Constable Richard Brezniac.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: There's drama when young mum Farheena collapses half-way through an appointment. Sarup has come to see Dr Aftab Arif about the painful raised skin that has developed around his bypass surgery scar.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: There's a shortage of staff in the department - but no let-up. Philip's nose is bleeding uncontrollably. And former cancer patient Ruth suffers extreme stomach pain.

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Incidents featured include an abusive patient refusing to leave the department, a heroin overdose, an agonising toothache and a supermarket guard who's been attacked while doing his duty.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Following specialist emergency response teams on their most extreme medical call outs, embedded with the Critical Care and Air Ambulance Response cars.

programme.title: The Hospital: Life On The Line
programme.desc: Patient Margo urgently needs life-saving surgery, in a five-hour operation to fix a faulty heart. Geoff, 86, is at risk of heart failure but open-heart surgery is too risky at his age.

programme.title: Babies 24/7: The Maternity Ward
programme.desc: Rachael is set to undergo the most complex caesarean the hospital has ever carried out.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Sister Abbey leads the team through a flood of cases in Barnsley, including a patient with cellulitis, an injury after being thrown from a horse, and a toddler with a head wound.

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: Following work at a specialist clinic where four top dermatologists treat a range of conditions. They squeeze, drain or pop cysts, lipomas and anything else that's getting under their patients' skin.

programme.title: Skin A&E

programme.desc: Karen hunts antiques with husband Rob in Benidorm, Ant hosts a packed fundraiser in Alicante, and two-jobs Anthony juggles bar windows and pool tables in sunny Spain.

programme.title: Fare Dodgers: At War With The Law
programme.desc: Investigators trail a man they believe has racked up nearly £2,500 in unpaid fares by fraudulently making contactless payments with his bank card.

programme.title: Traffic Cops

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A pursuit of a reckless getaway driver in a stolen car ends with a full-scale air-to-ground search for a suspect and a battle to save his life. programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The traffic cops respond to a report of a car linked to a drunken assault with a baseball bat. On quarter-finals night, a simple case of a drunk and uninsured driver proves much more difficult to deal with.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: It is a few day before Christmas, but Jason is short of festive cheer when a yuletide party becomes a full-blown riot. programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Scott and Adam discover a huge stash in the boot of a car, and a runaway dealer just misses mowing down Gary. Throw in five cars pursuing a runaway on a busy motorway and you are in for quite a ride.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Scott and Dave track a pair of mobile phone thieves with the help of GPS technology, Nick pushes his motor to the limit as he pursues a criminal gang and Jason has to deal with his own personal traffic nightmare. Elsewhere, Vicky spots a van overflowing with suspicious-looking scrap and a BMW ploughs into a house over the Christmas period.

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When Mitch is the victim of a series of life-threatening "accidents," suspicion points to a visiting lifeguard from Australia.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and his lifeguard team rush to save Hobie, ex-wife Gayle and her fiancé after their plane crashes in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Romance prevails when Jackie tries to intensify her relationship with Mitch, Matt and Summer deal with their feelings for each other and Hobie falls in love.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After rekindling her relationship with a former love (John Allen Nelson), C.J. (Pamela Denise Anderson) discovers that he has a serious disease.

programme.desc: C.J. is pursued by a persistent executive who tries to impress her with his hot-air ballooning skills; Slade returns unexpectedly.

programme.desc: Mitch agonizes over the near-drowning of a boy who lies in a coma.

programme.desc: Documenting the place of village halls at the heart of communities across Scotland throughout the 20th century. programme.desc: Joe and Jerry are two innocent musicians who accidentally witness a gangland murder. To get out of town in a hurry and be paid for it, they disguise themselves as women, and join an all-girl band travelling to Florida. All seems to be going well until Joe, as Josephine, starts to fall for Sugar Kane, the band's singer, and Jerry, as Daphne, elicits more interest than he'd like from millionaire Osgood Fielding III.

programme.title: Nobody's Perfect: The Making of Some Like It Hot

programme.title: My Week With Marilyn
programme.desc: Colin Clark works as an assistant on the set of the Laurence Olivier and Marilyn Monroe film the `Prince and the Showgirl'. In Inverness, PC Siobhan Cooper faces rowdy bank holiday crowds.

programme.title: Serie A Scots

Their Napoli side won the League and Super Cup, but perhaps their greatest achievement is yet to come with Scotland heading to World Cup 2026. Jonathan Sutherland returns to Napoli to meet the Scottish superstars of Serie A.

programme.title: Away with the Tartan Army: Scotland's Best Moments
programme.desc: Featuring rare archive and home video, Stuart Cosgrove and Tam Cowan explore the highs and lows of following the Scotland international men's team, win, lose or draw, and take a trip with the Tartan Army to count down Scotland's best moments.

programme.title: Pitch Invasion: How the Scottish and Irish Changed Football
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Leeds United was the dominant force in English football. Central to this success was their tough tackling midfield led by Irishman Johnny Giles and their Scottish captain Billy Bremner.

programme.title: Still Game
programme.desc: While Isa gets into a fix with some cute little animals, Jack and Victor decide to stop putting things off and go on that adventure they have been planning for years. A new month rolls round and Jack is excited to see what new picture he will reveal on his calendar, but tensions quickly rise as Victor tries to meddle in his fun.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 2010. Niall and Ava face major life changes as Ruben struggles with his relationship. An impulsive choice between Mona and Niall has serious consequences for all involved.

programme.title: Two Doors Down
programme.desc: Beth and Cathy think they are doing their good deed for the day when they drop Christine off at the hospital reception, but while Cathy manages to slip away, poor Beth doesn't get off so lightly and is committed to a visit post-op. With a long list of demands from Christine, Beth and Eric return later with her supplies to find that instead of being sore and exhausted after surgery, she has been sleeping off her dinner.

programme.title: Asia
programme.desc: In the planet's most densely populated continent, animals live at extremely close quarters with people, from tigers making a home in town to elephants stopping traffic for food.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May head to Vietnam to travel the entire length of the country in just eight days, thereby achieving what the American military failed to do in ten years. First they must each buy some suitable transport for the trip and, despite having several million Dong in their pockets, this proves to be rather more difficult than they thought.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard and James face their greatest challenge to date as all three are sent to Africa and each told to buy a second-hand car costing no more than £1,500. It must not be a 4x4 and must not be designed in any way to go off-road. Which could be a problem, since their task is then to drive across the wilds of Botswana, negotiating massive salt pans, treacherous rivers and animal reserves.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part special, Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May are in Africa with a simple mission - to find the definitive source of the Nile. Over the years many explorers claim to have already done just that, but the `Top Gear' trio believe that they can do better by travelling further and faster than any exploration team in history using only grit, ingenuity and three ageing estate cars.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May continue their epic African odyssey. Having survived insane traffic, lethal mudslides and some distinctly dubious map reading, the trio and their ailing estate cars reach the climax of their quest to find the definitive source of the Nile.

programme.title: BBC Comedy Short Films
programme.desc: Comedy short films from new and established talent. Showcasing original, weird and very funny films.

programme.title: BBC Radio 1's Big Weekend
programme.desc: Radio 1's Big Weekend returns to Sunderland's Herrington Country Park for a bank holiday weekend packed with live music. Saturday's line-up promises huge performances from some of the world's biggest stars, and we'll be reliving all the action from across the Main Stage and New Music Stage.

programme.title: P Diddy: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: Yinka Bokinni investigates how Sean Combs has gone from being the world's biggest hip-hop mogul to haemorrhaging money, businesses, friends and fans in a matter of months. The world's biggest hip-hop mogul's legacy is now indelibly tarnished.

programme.title: Zara McDermott
programme.sub-title: The Idaho Murders: Trial by TikTok
programme.desc: Zara McDermott heads to the USA and the small college town of Moscow, Idaho to find out about the tragic murder of four students and the global online manhunt that followed their deaths.

programme.title: The Fast and the Farmer-ish
programme.desc: With tortuous challenges ahead, the teams focus on bagging as many points as possible in the semi-final. One team thinks it's all over before it even starts, but there are twists in the tale.

programme.title: Mastermind

programme.title: Lightning
programme.desc: Comedian Zoe Lyons presents the electrifyingly fast quiz with a £3,000 jackpot. Six plucky contestants compete across six rounds testing their general knowledge, quick thinking and speedy reactions whilst our ruthless spotlight patrols the studio.

programme.title: Under the Vines
programme.desc: Oakley Wines enjoys newfound fame and welcomes a surprise visitor, while gala preparations take an explosive turn, putting the entire showcase at risk.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Elephants
programme.desc: Baby elephant Breeze is growing up fast, but as the dry season approaches she must face her biggest test yet. Her brother Buster, meanwhile, seems intent on getting them both into trouble. Outside the reserve, trouble brews as people and elephants come into conflict, and the team devise an unusual solution when a marauding group of bulls cause havoc by breaking into fields and raiding crops.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Michael Aspel introduces a selection of fascinating finds from a recent visit to Harrogate, including a table fashioned from an ancient bedpost, the diary of a young lady who toured Great Britain in 1815, and a piece of naval scrimshaw.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Antiques experts Christina Trevanion and Michael Baggott find great maritime memorabilia, including a ships bell and a diver's knife and Paul Martin meets a Grimsby trawler man on the very vessel he took to sea.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Every day this week, celebrity contestants Cheryl Baker, Chris Bavin, Axel Blake and Sophie Willan take on a series of quiz rounds selected by the host, quiz legend Richard Osman.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Continuing his travels in Budapest, Michael Portillo begins in the small town of Huvösvölgy, where he encounters a surprising railway run almost entirely by children.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Quiz show host and novelist Richard Osman takes on his other half, comedian, actress and `Dr Who' star Ingrid Oliver, in a competition to find the most profitable antiques. Teaming up with experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Raj Bisram, they head for the knick-knack shops of Norfolk with £400 to spend each. While Ingrid can't resist a sad doggy face when it comes to works of art, she and Raj bravely come face to face with a dragon in Norwich.

programme.title: Springwatch
programme.desc: The pressure builds as chicks prepare to fledge and predators close in. The Springwatch team hope to capture even more intimate moments from the lives of the wildlife calling National Trust Crom home.

programme.title: A Life in Ten Pictures
programme.desc: A series of extraordinary lives each unlocked by a just a handful of images, from iconic shots to private snaps, their secrets revealed by those who know their stories best.

programme.title: Peelers: The PSNI for Real
programme.desc: BBC journalist Stephen Nolan travels with a team of PSNI cops, racing to 999 calls for a jaw-dropping view of frontline policing in Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Featuring extensive coverage of the day's top national and international news stories, along with explanations about the context and potential aftereffects.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Surgeons: At the Edge of Life
programme.desc: Surgeons drain all of their patient's blood from his body to replace damaged arteries. A patient's fertility is at risk without a complex operation to remove diseased bowel.

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: Knockout week continues, and the chefs must prove themselves enough to make it into their first professional kitchen.

programme.title: Interior Design Masters
programme.desc: Alan and the final five designers head to Leeds to transform studio rental flats. They must cleverly divide open-plan spaces and inject character into show flats to entice potential renters. Former Interior Design Masters winner Lynsey Ford joins Michelle to critique the designs, and they are blown away by the dramatically different results.

programme.title: Peelers: The PSNI for Real
programme.desc: Anna and Perri race to a violent offender, Tom consoles a woman whose loved one has been hit by a taxi. The Peelers control an angry crowd outside a sex offender's home.

programme.title: Two Weeks in August
programme.desc: Zoe and her family arrive on a remote Greek island, hoping a holiday reunion with friends will be an escape from reality. But can she keep pretending when her husband Dan's dark secret threatens to ruin everything? A hedonistic first night party is the release they all need. But it sets off a chain of events that will change them all forever. Zoe begins to wonder if there are bigger forces at play. We are in Greece after all, land of the gods.

programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: This Is CBeebies
programme.desc: Welcome to the CBeebies channel. Programmes start at 6.00am.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the exceptional painter Spinach creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Sula, Pando, Flop and Padget all have a knack, a special thing that only they can do. Bing is frustrated when all his own knacks are easy for everyone else to do too. When Pando accidentally hurts Bing's ear they are all in for a surprise, as Bing discovers he does have a knack that no-one else can do.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa Laa leaves muddy footprints on a rug but magically makes them disappear by singing; in Tummy Tales, the children enjoy a squelchy walk through mud with bare feet.

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Tee and Mo are on a car trip to the beach, but Tee runs out of entertainment immediately! It's going to be a long trip.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea makes a scary monster from craft materials, but Supertato wants to be its friend.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing is teaching Charlie how to throw, but when he throws the ball in the lounge it knocks the fruit over! Bing starts to explain, but Charlie interrupts, leaving Flop to believe Charlie did it. Bing happily shows Charlie how to voosh Squeaky instead, but it flies out of his hands and hits Flop's tray of snacks! After some encouragement, Bing tells Flop the truth and apologises.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Betty's new ice cream flavour is so light, it makes everybody in town float in the air. How will Mojo and Bo get everyone's feet back on the ground? By floating up there with them!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with, Hennie bounces around in new dance shoes, and Happy loves water as much as Roly loves potatoes!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: After hearing a strange sound, the Squirrels turn to Duggee to help identify its source. They learn about sound waves, and that you can listen for different qualities in the sounds, such as if it's loud, quiet, high or low. Describing the sound can help you work out where it's coming from, so Duggee lets the Squirrels close their eyes as they listen to sounds and make their guesses.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious crabs home from the beach, Bluey and Bingo want to play a game of Tickle Crabs. Dad must learn to endure the pain of their tickles until he is finally rescued by a friendly seagull.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the rainforest, upsetting the tree frogs that live in the jungle.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Big Move
programme.desc: When Lily's father decides to move the family out of the Lake District, Peter comes up with a clever but dangerous plan to change Dr Bobtail's mind.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: The Octonauts help a young manta ray find the secret manta ray feeding grounds. However, when they finally locate it, the Octonauts become caught in the middle of a dangerous feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: A big hairy monster with a big hairy tummy who loves puzzles? Find out who is in Big Tum's tum! Learn how to find missing numbers with the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: When I finds some invisible ink, she plays all kinds of incredible tricks on the other Alphablocks, but soon wishes she hadn't.

programme.title: Nick Cope's Popcast
programme.desc: While sorting through his hats, Nick realises his favourite hat is missing. Can today's Popcast song help him find it?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.sub-title: Top of the Pups: Five Little Ducks
programme.desc: Mrs Weaver and the Penguins help reunite Mummy Duck with her babies as they sing Five Little Ducks.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit Patch in the Cloud Kitchen. He has found a tiny mouse in his pocket, which reminds him of a tasty treat recipe to make with the Playtimers - pocket mouse pitta!

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Sula head off for a picnic at the paddling pool with Flop. But when they get there, they are shocked to find there is no water inside. Bing's disappointment soon gives way to the realisation that it's a very special pool day. With no water there are all sorts of games they can play that are usually against the pool rules.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `coat' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see various types of coats: from a rain coat to a snowy coat and even a glowy coat. We see a dinosaur coat and a dog in a coat.

programme.title: Lu & the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Lu gets scared when she meets a huge Tara at the library. Lu wants Dad to play with her while he's working from home. Lu has trouble finding a new book she enjoys as much as her last one. The bugs talk about books they love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: While Kiri is playing with Rockaroonie, Lou sees an island in the middle of the lake that's completely covered in flowers. How can he get there?

programme.title: Froglets
programme.desc: The Froglets find a magnifying glass and become detectives to hunt for a missing crayon.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos watch a horse going over a jump and try to have a go themselves. Meanwhile, back in the Boat, the Stop-Go Car visits Peekaboo and they play a game of leapfrog.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.sub-title: We're All Friends: Pick Your Own
programme.desc: Justin and George meet a friend at a fruit and veg garden, while Mr Tumble sets up a shop.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go on a day trip to the Hidey Hup. They take turns on the Tubby Bouncy, the Tubby Slidey and the Tubby Spinny, before they go on the Tubby Uppy Downy together.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Giovanna and Baby Bear welcome babies Evie, Joseph, Luke, Thea, Benjamin, Eliza and their grown-ups to The Baby Club. Parents, carers and their babies at home are invited to join in with all the fun activities too! Inside everyone's bags are blankets which are explored through discovery, play, song and story. Grown-ups at home are encouraged to take part by hiding a baby appropriate blanket inside a fabric bag or pillowcase for them to reveal and explore with their baby!

programme.title: Tiny Tunes
programme.desc: Lisa and the children squeeze fresh orange juice and sign and sing `Oranges and Lemons'.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Spring is the time of year when lots of different plants grow. Abbie and James join Aaron in the garden for a fun game of big plant, small plant, taking it in turns to spot plants of different sizes. They soon find a tiny one that's just poked its head above the soil - but where has it come from?

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Rebecca and Murphy are dealing with a glut of carrots from the vegetable patch, and they have made everything from carrot cake to carrot juice. This inspires Murphy's first idea - a cartoon bunny rabbit. The Mini Monsters are making colourful caterpillars, and Rebecca's uncle is snug as a bug in his woolly cardigan when he calls her on the Magic Monster Mirror. The Recycling Express brings an empty box, which Rebecca and Murphy transform into a cardboard kitty cat.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger the Tricarrotops explores the world of the crunchiest era, going on adventures throughout the colourful Vegesaur Valley.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey runs to catch up to Mum as she goes for a walk at the beach. She comes across a series of fun encounters along the way.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Norrie is running late to Squirrel Club, so Duggee teaches the squirrels what a commute is: a journey that can take people from home to learn, work or play.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Mmm food. Fruit, vegetables and taste buds, this rap is all about mealtimes and features a special guest.

programme.title: Let's Go for a Walk
programme.sub-title: Ten-Mile Snake and Willow Tree Walk
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers walk to a great place to play a train game. On the way they find a ten-mile-long snake, make friends with a woodlouse, listen to the wind blowing through willow trees and even stomp like giants!

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: We meet five-year-old Henry and his family: Mummy, Mama, and little sister Sophie. There's lots of fun in store with a breakfast boogie and a visit to a farm. Back at home, they have some bouncy fun on the trampoline.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Lola's family are from Spain, a country in southern Europe. She is making a traditional Spanish dish called empanadas for her friends, with a fish and vegetable filling and a side of Spanish dancing!

programme.title: Maddie's Do You Know?
programme.desc: Maddie is listening for sounds. First, she discovers how wearing a hearing aid can help us hear more clearly. She meets 7 year old Zara who uses a hearing aid, before visiting the audiology department in a children's hospital to see where hearing aids are made. Maddie finds out what happens when we have our hearing tested. She listens to different sounds through headphones so the Audiologist can see how well her ears hear sounds.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Therapy dog Toffee and his owner, Helen, are on a mission to help their new neighbours Kayla the vet and her daughter Tilly on moving-in day.

programme.title: Go Wild
programme.sub-title: Aneeshwar and Lizzie: Mandrill and Sand Lizard
programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet some colourful characters - the amazing mandrills, which are the largest species of monkey in the world. They get close enough to see the beautiful blue and red faces of the males. Next, Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet sand lizards. They are surrounded by many females, who blend in perfectly with their sandy home, as well as some colourful males, who are much easier to spot.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Vet Jess and Waffle visit the kennels to check on Waffle's new friend, Pepper, who is sad. Waffle helps to find out the reason why, snuggly toy PegStar is broken.

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Poor Baba is sick and needs to get some rest in the burrow. His kind big sister, Oona, promises to bring him back a very shiny shell to cheer him up.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: The `Small Potatoes' sing and dance their way across the stage in this show stopping musical number.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukee is desperate to meet the worms that live in the soil beneath the garden. Learning that they only come out when it rains, Yukee tries to simulate the sound before realising that it's the rhythm that the worms really love.

programme.title: Maddie and Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs are staging an epic show in the garden for Mum, but Dad keeps interrupting their performance with his noisy DIY. What is he building in that shed?

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are playing hide-and-seek and come across a pink snorting fluffy animal, a scruffelump. The Squirrels are excited and want to keep the scruffemlump as their pet, but Duggee is wary. Keeping a pet is a lot of work. They need feeding, cleaning, exercising and much more that will keep you very busy. But they are wonderful too and can bring a lot of love to life.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Numberblocks make a new friend who likes to roll dice, and with Six in the mix, everything's a game. Learn all about the number six.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: From A to Z, every `Alphablock' has fun discovering the magic of wordplay. It's race day, will V vroom vroom to victory?

programme.title: Something Special
programme.sub-title: We're All Friends: Let's Go Camping
programme.desc: Ben and his friends are in the forest, while Mr Tumble gets into a muddle pitching a tent.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: When the lights go out in the Home Dome, the Teletubbies get the giggles! The lights come back on again and there's Tubby Custard mess everywhere.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how chalk streams play an important role in their environment. They find out that they are a very special type of stream, with cool, clear water that is perfect for lots of plants to grow. They learn that many different creatures like to make their home in and around the streams too. On the way, they pretend to be kingfishers and herons and take a close look at some animals that live in chalk streams.

programme.title: Football Fantastics
programme.desc: Will Jaz get all her tasks done in time to be able to perform her egg dance with her Dad?

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Motorbike rider Grace shows off three amazing machines that are all kinds of transport. Grace goes underground to drive a tube train, shows off a hanging railway and then drives a hydrogen boat.

programme.title: Dodge's Pup School
programme.desc: Miss Collie brings her pet stick insect, Woody, to class, but halfway through the day, Woody mysteriously vanishes! Dodge, Woofer, and Jazz spring into action, convinced a pup has taken him, and launch an investigation to track down the culprit. Just as Dodge thinks he's cracked the case, they discover Woody was in his tank all along, showing off some surprising skills!

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger the Tricarrotops explores the world of the crunchiest era, going on adventures throughout the colourful Vegesaur Valley.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above & Beyond
programme.desc: Ranger Marsh recounts Shellington's journey to reunite a monitor lizard with his siblings.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Saving of the Shrew
programme.desc: But with his father's journal and the help of his best friends Benjamin and Lily, Peter is ready for some fun and delightful new discoveries.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: When the Squirrels search for Enid, they are surprised to hear her meow from the top of the Mighty Sugar Bun Mountain. The Squirrels prepare for the climb to rescue Enid, but first Duggee teaches them what they need to pack in their backpacks for a successful trip. The team walk through rocky terrain, grey skies, plentiful rain and snow blizzards but keep morale high as they learn how phrasing negative thoughts into helpful ones will let them overcome any challenges along the way.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: It is Sweetwood Spa Day, but Zigzag is so excited that she struggles to relax.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad and the Prickly
programme.desc: Prickly Pear arrives in the supermarket and tries to take over Evil Pea's freezer. Supertato discovers that Prickly Pear isn't mean at all and just needs some good friends.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: An old map, mysterious clues and ancient secrets, Mojo and Bo are after the treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton! But Preston is after it too, so they need to get there first.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad brings a pair of tenacious crabs home from the beach, Bluey and Bingo want to play a game of Tickle Crabs. Dad must learn to endure the pain of their tickles until he is finally rescued by a friendly seagull.

programme.title: Zog
programme.desc: Zog starts sleepwalking, wreaking havoc in the forest. Pearl and Gadabout need to work together to help him, but they can't seem to put their personal disagreements aside.

programme.title: Balamory
programme.desc: Dr Ollie forgets who he asked to play the wizard in his play! Ava's memory-jogging machine helps him recall, but things get confusing at the nursery.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: It's early in the morning after the Brooklyn-Bells have returned from holiday and there's someone banging on their front door. It's Mrs Hobbs and she's furious. Waffle left Mrs Hobbs' kitchen taps running and now her home is flooded and there's water pouring out of her front door.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafi learns that changing the plan can lead to an even better adventure.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.sub-title: - Spring:It's Time to Open a Cafe
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran visit the park cafe, where JoJo tries the daily special on the menu for the first time. When they get home, they decide to make a play cafe in Gran Gran's garden for JoJo's toys to visit. JoJo makes a menu and Gran Gran helps her make the play food. JoJo learns how much fun it is to run a cafe - especially when you have a special on the menu.

programme.title: Sarah & Duck
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck learn to bobsleigh and have a speedy, snowy adventure with Scarf Lady's help.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: Major invents a giant magnet. Everything metal flies towards it, from soup tankards to knitting needles. Mother and Granny tell Major to take it outside where it can't do any harm. But then the Iron Chicken lands, and after an unfortunate incident where she gets stuck to the magnet, she tells Major, Tiny and Small about a strange sound she has heard in space. They investigate and find a moon whale trapped in an old metal rocket booster. The magnet turns out to be perfect for the rescue.

programme.title: Beddybyes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa are playing a copying game. BaBa likes copying MeMo and wants to continue, but at the Play Tree, MeMo wants to play a different game with some beepy horns. BaBa still wants to copy MeMo and is sad at Yummy Time when MeMo and the Yummies play something else. MeMo doesn't want BaBa to be sad. With the help of the Yummies, MeMo finds a happy way to compromise.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: Makka Pakka has a pile of six stones. He gives one stone to Igglepiggle, one stone to Upsy Daisy and one to each of the Tombliboos. Then the teeny tiny Pontipines take Makka Pakka's last stone.

programme.title: Cbeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.sub-title: Gregory Porter: What a Wonderful World
programme.desc: Gregory Porter sings the classic What a Wonderful World as a special bedtime story.

programme.desc: Nigel Havers welcomes five more sets of sellers to the Bidding Room, where they try to persuade one of five dealers to buy the items they are trying to sell. Before facing the dealers, each seller meets Nigel and auctioneer Simon, who values their items. Simon also gives them top tips on the history and key characteristics of their piece, so that when they enter the bidding room, they have all the information they need to try to haggle the best possible price from the dealers.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.sub-title: Sticky Fingers; Life in the Fraud Lane

programme.title: Executive Decisions

programme.title: The Strong Man Badal

programme.title: Friends

programme.sub-title: The One With a Chick and a Duck

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is dating Rachel again but hates what he had to do to get back together, while Phoebe and her real mother, Phoebe Snr, get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Monica is badly stung by a jellyfish and has to resort to drastic measures to relieve the pain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey lose all their furniture, Monica finds that one date with her high-school heartthrob is more than enough, and Ross plays tricks on Rachel following their break-up. programme.desc: Rachel forces Ross to terminate their marriage, Phoebe's first triplet babysitting experience proves stressful, and Joey pretends to own a German sports car.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra convinces Ray to work from home after reading an article about people who prefer to be at the office than with their family, but things do not turn out as she had planned.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's competitive side emerges when Debra invites him to help her write children's books for Ally.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray buys his father a fancy aquarium for his birthday, a gift that depresses the elderly man.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray reluctantly accompanies Debra to a high school reunion where he is unmasked as a former nerd. He is later shocked to learn that Debra was one of the cool kids who used to throw him into the girls' toilets.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: After her Tupperware party is ruined, Debra decides she's had enough of her interfering mother-in-law.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's wish list for Christmas includes a little romance with Debra, but she proves to be a difficult gift to unwrap.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Without the Ski Trip
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel have been fighting for the group's attention since the break up. Rachel invites everyone except Ross to her family cabin in the mountains, but on the way to the cabin, they run out of petrol. Everyone wants to call Ross for help, but Rachel won't let them.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Hypnosis Tape
programme.desc: Phoebe is upset when her 18-year-old half-brother, Frank Jr, wants to marry his attractive home economics teacher, who is more than 25 years older than him. Elsewhere, Monica receives a tip from an admirer worth a small fortune, and a hypnosis tape intended to assist Chandler give up smoking has a rather strange effect on him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Tiny T-Shirt
programme.desc: Rachel's former colleague Mark asks her out on a date. When Rachel invites Ross to her apartment, he thinks she wants to get back together, but she just wants to return his things. Later, as Rachel and Mark return from their date, Ross spies on them through the peephole of Joey and Chandler's door. Meanwhile, Monica dates a millionaire, and Joey is cast in a play and clashes with the female lead.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica inherits a beautiful dollhouse that is too elaborate to play with, so Phoebe makes her own, but it meets a sad end. Meanwhile, Joey thinks he's found his true love, and Rachel's boss dates Chandler, placing her in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With a Chick and a Duck
programme.desc: When Monica's millionaire friend Pete buys a restaurant and asks Monica to be the head chef, she is faced with a difficult decision. Meanwhile, Ross makes a sacrifice for Rachel, and Joey buys Chandler an unusual pet.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The friends go to the opening night of one of Joey's plays. When Rachel finds out that Ross is bringing a date, she finds one of her own. Ross tries to convince Rachel that her date is mentally unbalanced. Meanwhile, Joey's play gets terrible reviews, but his co-star provides some comfort.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross develops a skin growth that doctors can't identify.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ultimate Fighting Champion
programme.desc: Monica finds herself dating a guy who wants to be the Ultimate Fighting Champion. Meanwhile, Chandler finds his male boss's attentions just a little too friendly, and the group overhear a scandalous conversation at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe invites everyone to stay at her massage client's beach house for the weekend. Phoebe meets someone who knows details about her family, Rachel expresses her jealousy of Ross' uninhibited girlfriend, and Joey nags the friends into agreeing to play a party game that requires the participants to gradually take off items of clothing.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is dating Rachel again but hates what he had to do to get back together, while Phoebe and her real mother, Phoebe Snr, get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Monica is badly stung by a jellyfish and has to resort to drastic measures to relieve the pain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey lose all their furniture, Monica finds that one date with her high-school heartthrob is more than enough, and Ross plays tricks on Rachel following their break-up. Elsewhere, Phoebe is temporarily convinced that a cat is the reincarnation of her dead adoptive mother Lily.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a brief fling with Rachel's boss Joanna which leaves him handcuffed without his trousers in her office. Meanwhile, Joey can only afford one book in an encyclopaedia set, and Monica caters a party for her mother.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey argues with the building superintendent Treegar and ends up having to help him practise ballroom dancing. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler can't get out of their gym membership even though neither of them wants to exercise, and Phoebe loses her massage job for kissing a client.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joey's New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Chandler falls for Joey's new date, Ross discovers that the woman that he thinks he's dating actually thinks he's the babysitter, Rachel's new college boyfriend steals, and Phoebe tries to re-catch a cold to improve her singing voice.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica decide to go into business together after they cater a funeral where the widow tries not to pay, and Ross' date with the beautiful Cheryl goes awry when he kills a rat in her filthy apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler finally confesses to his feelings for Kathy just after she splits up with Joey, Ross rediscovers his hopeless musical skills on the keyboard which Phoebe alone appreciates, and Chandler buys new furniture for the apartment since the robbery left them with just the canoe, chick and duck.

programme.desc: When a woman fails to come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing; as the investigation unfolds, Lt Kenda realises he could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: A gang member, a jealous lover or a complete stranger? Kenda and Anderson hunt for a killer who shot a young man outside his home.

programme.title: Fugitives Caught on Tape
programme.desc: A wanted felon smashes into a state trooper's car while fleeing from local police and county deputies; police get into a shootout with a man wanted for murdering his roommate; a deputy's PIT manoeuvre knocks a fugitive's car up on two wheels.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A man calls 911 on the cops, a woman is accused of stealing a horse and buggy, a man allegedly trespasses and shoots rats in a neighbour's yard, and more.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The judge has harsh words for a man convicted of killing his mother and her boyfriend; a woman charged with Assault and Battery takes out her frustrations on a jailhouse podium; the judge mutes a defendant who won't stop interrupting him in court.

programme.title: Murder Detective
programme.desc: New. Sharon Birchwood: Former senior detective Graham Hill sheds new light on the inner workings, twists and turns of criminal investigations, showing how they were solved. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Murder Detective
programme.desc: In April 2019, the remains of a woman were found in a freezer in an apartment in London's East End. Investigators brought the freezer to be x-rayed, and it revealed two frozen bodies.

programme.title: Murder Detective
programme.desc: Maheswaran Kaneshan sought asylum in the UK, but became caught up in a gang feud that turned deadly. His life was controlled by the gang that had brought him to London. Gang bosses brutally beat Maheswaran, causing him to later die in hospital.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: Evil Unearthed On A Sleepy Farm
programme.desc: A farmhouse in a quaint, wooded town became one of New Hampshire's most notorious crime scenes. Delusional killings confounded investigators and appalled residents of Epping, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.sub-title: The Killings that Shook a College Community
programme.desc: A young boy and his family's housekeeper are brutally murdered in an upscale Omaha neighbourhood. Their case remains unsolved for years until another double homicide reveals a link and unmasks a serial killer.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found in her locked apartment with 20 stab wounds. The medical examiner classifies her death as murder but later changes the ruling to suicide, a decision that forces her family into the fight of their lives.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: A terrifying crash off a mountain road leaves one woman dead and her husband injured. The fatal accident raises suspicions as a family fights to expose the real story.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters are involved in a horrific crash on the island of Maui. One sister miraculously survives after their car plunges over the side of a cliff; questioning if this was a tragic accident or something more ominous.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A teenager vanishes during a walk to the store on a cold winter night. The next morning police find her lifeless body in a snowbank six miles away.

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: My Strange Arrest

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.desc: The story of a how a vindictive ex-boyfriend stalked his partner.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When a woman fails to come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing; as the investigation unfolds, Lt Kenda realises he could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal

programme.title: Salvage Kings
programme.desc: Ted and Justin travel to Market Village Mall in Markham, Ontario, where they are tasked with carefully unlocking mysterious vault doors while the demolition team begins tear down.

programme.title: Salvage Kings

programme.title: Salvage Kings
programme.desc: While hunting for salvage in a 1870s farmhouse, Ted finds something rare hidden behind the walls. Elsewhere, the demolition team are put to the test.

programme.title: Salvage Kings
programme.desc: The demolition and salvage team at Priestly Demolition Inc is in the business of tearing down buildings, but first, they give their salvage crew the chance to go inside and recover historic treasures left behind.

programme.title: Salvage Kings
programme.desc: The demo and salvage teams head to picturesque Manitoulin Island hoping to uncover architectural salvage and long-forgotten treasures.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Airing from 2005 to 2009 on NBC, the game show series returns to primetime TV with original host Howie Mandel. A contestant must choose from 26 sealed briefcases containing a marker for various amounts of cash -- from one penny to $1 million. The player then eliminates the remaining 25 cases one by one. The chosen ones are opened and the amount of money inside revealed. After several cases are opened, the player is tempted by the Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for not continuing the game and possibly winning a larger sum of money.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Any building project is stressful, especially if the build is in the middle of nowhere. A family builds a modern farmhouse off the grid in Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they are pushed to breaking point.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Cal Clark wants to build a cabin in Colorado, where his friend, Billy Joe, is starting an off-the-grid community; Cal and Billy Joe race to finish the cabin in time for hunting season, but a setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.desc: Plans are made for tufted deer Poppy and Honeysuckle to meet Draco, a potential mate known for his "fangs;" brother grizzlies prep for a new diet; a century-old Galapagos tortoise Abigail undergoes a critical surgery.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's crushing debt finally catches up to him, and he is in danger of losing his apartment, unless Gina can find a way to bail him out.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire senses Phil may be more into "Juliana" than her; Gloria's sister visits; Mitchell and Cameron get into a situation with Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire takes a first class seat on a flight, leaving Phil in coach; Gloria makes Jay teach Manny how to defend himself; Mitch, Cam and their friends throw Sal a belated baby shower.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: While stuck at the airport, Claire partakes in online snooping that creates drama with the rest of the family.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: When their competitor releases a catchy ad, Claire and Jay scramble to shoot a commercial of their own; Phil, Luke and Manny try to take down a drone that a neighbour keeps using to spy on Gloria; Andy is rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa discovers that honey-harvesters across the globe are dying out, she sets out on a crusade to save them. Unfortunately, her hopes rest on Mr Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes friends with a girl who has a wild imagination. Soon, Springfield is an enchanted land, populated by sprites and fairies.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer wonders if fate truly did deal him a tough hand after he finds out that the class presidential election he lost in high school was rigged.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart learns that he and a few other students at Springfield Elementary have aced the Vice President's Assessment practise test, exempting them from the real exam. Meanwhile, Homer's health insurance lapses when he forgets to make a payment and it makes for a harrowing day of accident avoidance as he tries to get his check to the insurance company without injuring himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge gives the kids an unforgettable history lesson with three tales about Henry VIII, US explorers Lewis and Clark, and the bitter rivalry between Mozart and Salieri.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer is late picking up Bart from a school football game, Bart protests by hooking himself up with Tom, a surrogate dad from an agency. Stung by being jilted by his own son, Homer gets into a monster brawl with Tom that even makes the news.

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: A lie spirals into a gigantic conflict for one couple. And with revelations happening left, right and centre, all of the relationships change irreversibly.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, PK attempts to show a different side to his character, and Stephen decides whether to see Claira again, or not.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recipe developer Mimi, who's 25, is looking for a fun-loving fellow creative. All seems well when her date, 29-year-old rugby referee and sausage roll maker Joel turns up with a gift for Mimi.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: After dating a few love rats, 24-year-old beautician Gemma wants to find prince charming. Fed up with men, 28-year-old tattoo artist Jennafer seeks the perfect woman.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: David questions whether Anthony has doubts, PK attempts to show a different side to his character, and Stephen decides whether to see Claira again, or not.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to South Philadelphia to try to turn around family-run restaurant Chiarella's, which is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian establishments. That isn't the only problem facing owners Tommy and Dina Defino. Their marriage is on the verge of collapse.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Erica starts working at a local department store, Beverly's bargain-hunting dreams come true. Meanwhile, Adam and Barry go to the racetrack with Pops.

programme.title: Paul Hollywood City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul finds a route through the history and cultures of Jerusalem by spending time with bakers who create incredible flavours for their communities. Inspired, Paul creates Jerusalem bagel bread, and almond and pomegranate loaf cake.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Nigel Slater creates a week's worth of simple but delicious meals from ingredients that are often overlooked. He effortlessly prepares a sumptuous beetroot cake, a lentil and chard stew and a beef and ale casserole, before travelling to Derbyshire to help keen gardeners Ian and Kathy create tasty food from their plot.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Simple Suppers
programme.desc: Mouth-watering chocolate cookies and crispy duck with honey and figs prove that a little bit of what you fancy does you good. Then to balance the scales, Nigel makes a couple of dishes full of clean-tasting flavours, with fresh herbs, tomatoes and crunchy greens - but whether saints or sinners, every dish will taste truly divine.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Alex is home from college, and the cousins are getting together for a street taco feast. Ree prepares all the fixin's, including Texas braised beef, ranch chicken, avocado lime crema, salsa diablo and basic brown beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond throws a cocktail bash for the crew helping to open her store in town. There's a delicious line-up of make-ahead portable canapes and sweet treats on the menu, plus a Pawhuska Prohibition Punch to toast the team.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Chicken Dim Sum and Crab Briks
programme.desc: On the menu this time is chicken dim sum, coconut buns, cucumber pickle and hoi sin sauce, plus crackin' crab briks, couscous salad and salsa.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie shows how to cook crispy duck and hoi sin lettuce parcels, and chicken cacciatore, spaghetti and smoky tomato sauce.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina revisits flavours from her past and brings them up to date; she makes lamb stew with spring vegetables from her newlywed days, split pea soup with crispy kielbasa from childhood and fresh raspberry mini corn muffins from her speciality store.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa
programme.desc: Ina Garten is serving up a seafood spread, starting with one-pot Fresh Crab and Pea Risotto. She also makes foolproof Baked Cod with Garlic and Herb Ritz Crumbs, Potato Galettes with Smoked Salmon and luxurious Lobster BLTs.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's the semi-final and the bakers' patisserie skills are tested in a booze-soaked signature, a tricky technical and a delicate showstopper showcasing their finesse and precision.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: Mary cooks up a celebration of five delicious dishes suitable for those special days, when you're having people around for dinner or simply want to treat a loved one at home. To start, Mary prepares some delicious salmon fillets with herbs and red pepper with a foolproof side of spiralized veg, perfect for any dinner party.

programme.title: James Martin's French Road Trip
programme.desc: James is back in Pornic, the Brittany seaside town where he learnt to be a French chef, and then as now the summer means a flood of delicious local strawberries.

programme.title: James Martin's French Road Trip
programme.desc: After shopping in a market in Saint-Servan, near St Malo, James prepares veal with rosemary and garlic, and cauliflower cooked with local cheese.

programme.title: James Martin's French Road Trip
programme.desc: After all this time eating fish, James wants to tuck into some tasty meat, and the market at Saint-Servan provides plenty of inspiration.

programme.title: James Martin's French Road Trip
programme.desc: James and Lawrence Keogh do some serious shopping in the market at Lamballe. What are they going to make with all that lamb, sweet black pudding, pears and pear liqueur, fromage frais, leeks and gateaux Bordeaux?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits America's most interesting and unique restaurants. Guy tries mamma's cooking in Oklahoma City with wings and waffles soul food style, and in Dallas, a family home turned restaurant.

programme.desc: Hoagie shop with homemade rolls; cafe serving house-cured pork belly; diner serving pot roast on a bun.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy samples fast food done right.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels across the United States to eat the country's best traditional food. Adam has an encounter with a Sasquatch Hamburger at the Big Foot Lodge in Memphis.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman faces another tough eating challenge in Columbus when he attempts to eat a two-and-a-half pound Dagwood Sandwich. Will he have enough room for dessert?

programme.desc: Buddy creates a cake for the Tribeca Film Festival with a popcorn-flavoured filling. Plus, a long-time customers return to place a special order.
