programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: LaQuesha wants two blingy dresses fit for her royal highness. Jessica is convinced she's too picky even to say yes to a dress at all. Plus, will Isabella's final look come together just days before her wedding?

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: It's new consultant Peter's first appointment, and it's a doozy! Christie's mum doesn't like plunging necklines or the energy of certain dresses. Monique, aka Boujetta, is so picky that she has Mindy and Randy both stumped.

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: The disappearance of a local lawyer shocks a Colorado mountain town, but emerging clues suggest the community' idyllic veneer is not all it seems.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.sub-title: Michelle Stewart; John Wilson; Helen Hill
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Michelle Stewart's first relationship came to an end, she was looking forward to moving on and exploring the exciting opportunities that lay ahead. But ex-boyfriend John Wilson had other ideas, failing to accept the break-up. He wanted to make sure that if he couldn't have Michelle, nor could anyone else. When young mum Helen Hill's husband didn't come home after a night out, panic set in, but nothing could have prepared her for the truth behind his absence.

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love
programme.desc: When three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths were no accident. Can detectives unravel this twisted tale of deceit?

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Macin Smith doesn't return from school, his parents fear he is in danger and a note hidden in his wallet leaves his family troubled. What happened?

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: When Rhonda Daugherty vanishes, detectives turn to the public for information. A tip leads to surveillance footage from a hotel that uncovers a journey of deceit.

programme.title: The Killer In My Family
programme.desc: The sister-in-law and brother of Surjit Athwal talk about her murder in a so-called `honour killing', discussing how two families were torn apart.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Family comes first to grandparents Ron and Kay Wilkson, though they may not have much money, their growing brood always knows how to make their own fun. However, something evil is prowling close to home and not everyone will make it out alive.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Tammy Gardner loves being a mum and running a daycare out of her suburban Delaware home; she also loves a night out on the town; what starts as innocent fun leads this 40-year-old down a dark path of jealousy and deadly rage.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: A farmhand goes missing from a sprawling cattle ranch, but the case takes a sinister turn when his body shows up miles down the Coweeman river.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the murder of 21-year-old Laura Davies and a savage doorstep attack involving sulphuric acid.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: An escaped inmate murders Debra Johnson, a highly respected Correctional Administrator, at her home outside the prison. With the public at risk, police scour through surveillance footage for clues to hunt him down before he strikes again.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.sub-title: Child In Heaven, One In Jail
programme.desc: Not every mother and father raise the child of their dreams. Some children grow up to become killers. Through heart-stopping stories, parents must come face to face with the horrible truth - that the child they loved and trusted is a monster.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Lindsay always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14 years old. What would happen if he found her?

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic investigators track down innocuous-seeming clues, such as dirty shoes or a tiny piece of plastic, placing a suspect at the crime scene.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2018, three women held hostage in a motel room by armed men face a night of terror that leaves 19-year-old Amber Meadows lying dead in the bathroom. Detectives must follow a trail of surveillance footage to find out who pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2020, 21-year-old Dioneth Lopez goes missing while on a trip to visit friends. Her body turns up in the woodlands of Washington State. She is treated as a Jane Doe until detectives find surveillance footage that pieces together her final hour.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love

programme.title: Disappeared

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, Ryan Lane receives a late-night phone call and goes out to meet a mystery caller and is never heard from again; Calgary Police Service turn to surveillance video to locate Ryan and find evidence of a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: The Killer In My Family
programme.desc: Relatives of `Suffolk Strangler', Steve Wright, reveal how his shocking crimes impacted the family. Were there any signs of his murderous intentions?

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: Police officer Albert Pacheco and his wife Cathy live Hawaii's Big Island, raising four kids in the bosom of their close-knit church community; what looks like a household steeped in traditional goodness is hiding something evil.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.sub-title: If Only He Had a Heart
programme.desc: Tina Swor and partner John Dalton start a new life in Spirit Lake, Idaho. But John's erratic behaviour and love of guns plague their fresh start. When Tina's best friend doesn't see her for days, she decides to call the cops.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: A mother of two turns up dead after a house fire - but her autopsy reveals death by strangulation. Lt. Mike Daniewicz must take to the streets of New Jersey's Little India to catch a killer whose desperation is matched only by his heartlessness.

programme.title: Judge Rinder's Crime Stories
programme.desc: Judge Robert Rinder looks at a man convicted of attempted rape as he tries to clear his name and a gang of criminals on an 18-month crime spree.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: An escaped inmate murders Debra Johnson, a highly respected Correctional Administrator, at her home outside the prison. With the public at risk, police scour through surveillance footage for clues to hunt him down before he strikes again.

programme.title: People Magazine Presents: Crimes of the 2000s
programme.desc: A spree killer who leaves his victims tied up with neckties torments the men of Atlanta in the fall of 2002. As investigators hit many dead ends, one clue left behind could be the final puzzle piece detectives need to tie these cases together.

programme.title: People Magazine Presents: Crimes of the 2000s
programme.desc: In 2003, a lively college town in Kentucky faces tragedy after the vicious rape and murder of student Katie Autry; as police sift through the suspect list, two people stand out from the rest; one learns if they play with fire, they will get burnt.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In June 2016, 65-year-old Larry Weaver decides to spend the night in Sikeston, Missouri, while on his way home to his wife. When there's no sign of him or his bike the next day, detectives rely on CCTV to uncover the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Detectives
programme.desc: Detectives are led down the Missouri River looking for a missing woman. And forensic experts must identify a murder victim and catch a killer from a few shreds of tape.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, police discover Demetrius Graves fatally stabbed on the street. Two days later, Bonnie Ross turns up dead at home. A trail of CCTV evidence uncovers that these two very different people share one fateful connection.

programme.title: Murder on CCTV
programme.desc: In 2010, three men were murdered in a convenience store in Minneapolis's Somali community. The store's CCTV uncovered evidence of a robbery gone wrong, and cameras from around the city offered clues as to the killer's identity.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening. A burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: James Duncan's family's search for him halts when the details of his murder are revealed, and they are almost as shocking as the murderer's identity.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The stories of the victims and those who got away.

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and crimes of infamous killer Myra Hindley. This film explores the stories of Brady and Hindley's five known murder victims and the accounts of the children who got away, most notably David Smith.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Wayne Couzens: Killer in Plain Sight
programme.desc: This extraordinary film reveals the shocking truth about the serving police officer who killed Sarah Everard, and asks how he was able to hide from scrutiny for so long.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Britton Tobin was a Scottish convicted serial killer and sex offender who served a whole life order at HM Prison Edinburgh for three murders committed between 1991 and 2006. Delve into the psychology of Peter to try and understand what turned him into such a cruel rapist and murderer.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: Killed Walking Home
programme.desc: Every three days, a woman is killed in the UK. These women could be sisters, daughters and friends. Although there is a lead that breaks open the case, what comes in light of the investigation is one that leaves an everlasting scar on the families.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.desc: NSA Agent Augustus Gibbons, fresh off the success of his last renegade recruitment, once again finds himself in need of an outsider. Gibbons and his new agent must track a dangerous military splinter group that is conspiring to overthrow the US Government in the nation's capital.

programme.title: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Marvin is a Milwaukee realtor who receives a crimson envelope from a former partner-in-crime whom he left for dead. He now finds himself thrust back into a world of ruthless hit men and double-crosses that turn his open houses into deadly war zones.

programme.title: American Night
programme.desc: An art dealer and a ruthless New York mafia boss fight for money, power and love.

programme.title: Hounds of War
programme.desc: A mercenary seeks revenge after his entire team gets wiped out during a final mission.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: Biochemist Michael Morbius tries to cure himself of a rare blood disease, but when his experiment goes wrong, he inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism instead.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: Nobody 2
programme.desc: Workaholic assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday to the small tourist town of Plummerville. However, he soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a corrupt theme-park operator, a shady sheriff, and a bloodthirsty crime boss.

programme.title: Nobody 2

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: The almost mythical ability of a middle-aged baseball player rockets a major-league team toward the 1939 pennant.

programme.title: Hope Springs

programme.title: Eddie the Eagle

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A lonely poet who's unlucky in love believes he's struck gold when he meets Harriet, an attractive, witty woman who owns a butcher's shop. They fall in love and marry, but a series of strange occurrences lead him to suspect that his new wife may be harbouring a dark and deadly secret.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon soon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Lighthearted adventures of a pair of news vendors in New York - one deaf, one blind - who go on the run when they are blamed for the murder of a customer. Each has seen - or heard - just a whiff of a clue, and a frantic chase ensues as the duo struggle to clear their names.

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer
programme.desc: A lonely poet who's unlucky in love believes he's struck gold when he meets Harriet, an attractive, witty woman who owns a butcher's shop. They fall in love and marry, but a series of strange occurrences lead him to suspect that his new wife may be harbouring a dark and deadly secret.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owner's kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd
programme.desc: A grant-greedy principal puts two clueless teens in a bogus class for students with special needs.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: A bungling bachelor becomes a last-minute babysitter. Buck's brother's three children are foisted on him when the parents are called away from home indefinitely. Although he seems to be an unsuitable guardian, Buck turns out to have an unexpected knack for parenting, but he must work hard to prove himself, especially when he needs to save his eldest niece from her unsavoury boyfriend.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: Ben Whittaker, a retired widower in his 70s becomes senior intern at a fashion based e-commerce company. Jules Ostin, the founder, while first hesitant, soon learns to respect and even like her new intern despite their age difference.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress', life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: Tootsie

programme.desc: A multi-generational tale of life, loss and love starring Oscar Isaac, Olivia Wilde and Antonio Banderas. Sky Cinema Original Film from This Is Us creator Dan Fogelman. (2018, 113 mins)

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Göring.

programme.title: Skincare
programme.desc: A famed aesthetician faces a new challenge when a rival opens a skin care boutique directly across from her store. Suspecting that someone is trying to sabotage her, she embarks on a quest to unravel the mystery of who's trying to destroy her life.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Ólafur Jóhann Ólafsson.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Ólafur Jóhann Ólafsson.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, `The Cinema List' explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit and his three sisters -- Flopsy, Mopsy and Cotton-Tail -- enjoy spending their days in Mr. McGregor's vegetable garden. When one of McGregor's relatives suddenly moves in, he's less than thrilled to discover a family of rabbits in his new home. A battle of wills soon breaks out as the new owner hatches scheme after scheme to get rid of Peter -- a resourceful rabbit who proves to be a worthy and wily opponent.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Four unlikely warriors rise from the sewers and join forces with fearless reporter April O'Neil to save New York from Shredder and his evil minions.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: Chicken Run
programme.desc: Award-winning DreamWorks animation from the Aardman team, telling the story of a band of chickens doomed to a life of egg-laying on a Yorkshire chicken farm. When a flamboyant American rooster arrives on the scene, the hens hope he can teach them to fly to freedom. However, when a chicken-pie making machine is installed, their need becomes urgent and they must devise other means of escape.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: Flavia
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her family's manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Starring Martin Freeman and Jonathan Pryce. (2026)

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of London's East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRA's Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lover's sex-change operation.

programme.title: The Towering Inferno
programme.desc: At the opening party of a colossal, but poorly constructed office building, a massive fire breaks out that threatens to destroy the tower and everyone in it.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her boss's office, she has an `accident', falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batman's efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A desperate and crazed man, with the help of an accomplice, takes a local Brooklyn bank hostage with plans to rob it in order to pay for his lover's sex-change operation.

programme.title: Dirty Harry
programme.desc: A violent and uncompromising police officer hunts for a psychopath who holds the city of San Francisco to ransom. Although the officer's unorthodox methods do not endear him to his superiors, the mayor reluctantly agrees that Harry Callahan seems to be the right cop for the job.

programme.title: Batman Forever
programme.desc: DA Harvey Dent and vengeful scientist The Riddler plan to take down Batman, as Dent wrongly believes that it is Batman's fault he was disfigured, and the scientist is angry with Bruce Wayne for rejecting his experiments. The Gotham City superhero is going to need his new partner, boy wonder Robin, but will he be able to cope with the distraction of sexy doctor Chase Meridian?

programme.title: Batman & Robin
programme.desc: Batman battles super-villain Mr Freeze and seductive eco-terrorist Poison Ivy. With Freeze planning a permanent winter, faithful butler Alfred falling to a mysterious illness, and Ivy coming between the caped crusader and Robin, teaming up with Batgirl is the crime-fighting duo's only chance of saving the day.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.desc: Kenya's growing human population is taking land and resources away from wildlife. The squeeze is creating increasing numbers of conflicts between humans and animals, and is one of the biggest issues in African conservation.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: An adventure with Thiago, a brave baby coati. Explores how this raccoon-like animal sharpens his sniffing and foraging skills, crosses suburban roads near his lush Brazilian forest home, and avoids inanimate and four-legged dangers.

programme.title: Great Parks of Africa
programme.sub-title: Chobe National Park: Land of Learning

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Three locations, one investigation. The Heritage Centre, Lafferty's Pub, and The Bell Inn give Derby a claim on the title of 'the most haunted city in Europe'. Bodies under the floor at the Heritage Centre; a skull - believed to belong to a murdered woman at Lafferty's; and a room that no one will stay in at the Bell Inn, make this investigation one of the most challenging and frightening of the series.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Fitz Manor, a hotel near Shrewsbury that is said to house the ghost of a homosexual priest who was believed to have been crucified in the dining room, the figure of a lady in the red room and cemetery and the ghost of a strong tobacco smoker who is smelt but not seen.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team holds a vigil among the tanks at Muckleburgh, a military museum on the Norfolk coast that has a number of reputed hauntings. programme.desc: In a special wild episode of Love Your Garden, Alan Titchmarsh and his team are in Bedfordshire, transforming a neglected outside space at Keech Hospice in Luton into a state of the art wildlife garden. programme.desc: Michelle enjoys a girlie chat with Ruth, and falls victim to a prank by Heston, who tricks her into diagnosing a healthy patient as having meningitis.

programme.title: Classic Holby City
programme.desc: Diane is anxious about the coroner's inquest into Dominic's death - and also suspects she is pregnant. Mubbs loses patience with Matt and Dean.

programme.title: Classic Casualty
programme.desc: Drama from Holby City. A boy is hurt after being caught in the cross-fire between two families. Lloyd discovers an elderly time waster has real health problems.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: A free night of bliss in a luxury hotel goes horribly wrong for Boulton and Stanton.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: A guilty Ricky makes a decision he may live to regret when Sam gets in touch, while back at home an oblivious Bianca resolves to spice up her marriage.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: As Sam hovers on the brink of going into labour, Ricky struggles to confess to Bianca that he may be the baby's father. Ian presents Jane with an offer she cannot refuse.

programme.title: Harry Wild
programme.desc: The despotic director of a cheap, daytime Irish soap opera has his throat cut in the middle of a scene. The producer is desperate for Harry and Fergus to quickly find the culprit so filming can resume.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: One of Ballarat Hospital's most prominent surgeons is found dead on his own operating table. Investigating, Blake is drawn into a web of jealousy and sexual intrigue.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Emerging from prison after being convicted of dealing in stolen goods, Lovejoy is anxious to discover who framed him and enlists the help of Lady Jane Felsham.

programme.title: Waiting for God
programme.desc: New boy Tom makes quite an impact on staff and guests when he decides to go on hunger strike until the food is improved.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: A mysterious man with a machine for locating `hidden forces' has Compo, Foggy and Clegg running round in circles.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The trio encounters a man, and his inflatable doll, which creates some natural curiosity among the three elders.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Wesley is nearly ready to take his creation off the `Top Secret' list and unleash it on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Kembleford Ramblers' annual outing takes a tragic turn when the local lord is found strangled.

programme.title: Art Detectives
programme.desc: When an art historian is found murdered in his home, DI Mick Palmer and DC Shazia Malik are sent to investigate. As they dig into the case, they uncover a vandalised painting, sabotaged security footage, and a dark family secret.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team's feathers are ruffled when Steve McAndrew, a retired detective from Glasgow, descends on the office like a bundle of Scottish energy. Brought in to reinvestigate one of his original cases - the disappearance of teenager Georgia Wright - McAndrew's policing methods raise a few eyebrows. He has a few tricks up his sleeve that make Brian and Gerry look like slaves to the rule book.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: Bodies pile up all over Yorkshire but Dalziel and Pascoe are always led back to the Wetherton Arts Centre, which is putting on a production of Oliver. Things become very personal for Dalziel and Pascoe when one of their own goes missing.

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Emerging from prison after being convicted of dealing in stolen goods, Lovejoy is anxious to discover who framed him and enlists the help of Lady Jane Felsham.

programme.desc: While a visiting theatrical troupe puts on a nativity play at St. Judas, a precious holy relic goes missing, and the actor playing Jesus is killed.Contains Mature Themes.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Churchill described Italy as the `soft underbelly of the crocodile', thinking the Allies could cut through it to reach Germany. However, it turns out to be tougher than he imagined.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: As Allied troops prepare to defend Burma - the shield and barrier protecting India - they are confronted in dreadful monsoon conditions by the Japanese, who are well-prepared for jungle warfare. Thus begins the longest retreat in British military history.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Life on the British Home Front is a time of gas masks, digging for victory, evacuation and the Squander Bug. The Luftwaffe redirect their bombing raids to provincial cities and U-boat operations in the Atlantic mean that food supplies are scarce.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Germany's initial triumphs lose momentum as the tide of the war turns in favour of the Allies. Internal opposition to the Reich culminates in an assassination plot.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: A previous experience with Wesley Pegden and his home-made racing car should have been warning enough, but when Compo, Clegg and Foggy learn that he now needs expert assistance with what can only be described as a once-in-a-lifetime discovery, how could they possibly refuse?

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth concocts an elaborate plan for Richard to turn him into an executive. She is sure he will be able to impress the Director of Frosticles, a breakfast cereal company in search of a Senior Executive, if only he has the opportunity to meet him in a social context.

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: When the wardens' HQ is bombed, they have to share the church hall with their arch enemies - the Home Guard! Naturally, Captain Mainwaring is in full bolshy mode.

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.sub-title: How to Ignite Your Errand Boy
programme.desc: Arkwright decides his profit margin would be increased if he could sell a product of his own making, so Granville is given the task of making home-made firelighters, an essential ingredient being his shredded disco shirt.

programme.title: Still Open All Hours
programme.desc: Granville takes delivery of a bargain consignment from Spain. Eric and Cyril fall out over a lost compass and Mr Newbold falls in and gets soaked on a boat trip with Mrs Rossi.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: In an effort to appear as intellectual as Lucy's friends, Lee shows off his `knowledge' of the art world - holding forth on the subject of an unknown artist, who his cleaner Barbara has told him is the next big thing. When Lucy takes the advice and invests a fortune in the artist's work, Lee is left trying to prevent her from finding out the artist is actually a nobody.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee finally manages to get a job as a caretaker, but taking up the new post involves moving out of the flat. Elsewhere, Kate interviews potential new flatmates including Pete, and Tim sees an opportunity to get back together with Kate. Plus, Lee's new boss proves to be a hard taskmaster. So, will Lee stick at the job or throw in the towel and move back in with Kate?

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: With his wedding only days away and tensions running high, Dermot suffers some pre-wedding jitters and takes refuge in a cupboard. Will Agnes be able to coax her son out in time for his nuptials? Meanwhile, Cathy gives her mother a book on homosexuality, leading Agnes to wonder who in her family is gay.

programme.title: Don't Wait Up
programme.desc: Toby and Angela face difficulties on their reconciliation cruise, while Tom and Madeline's weekend in the country is threatened.

programme.title: Harry Enfield and Chums
programme.desc: More comedy classics from Harry Enfield and his chums Paul Whitehouse and Kathy Burke, including appearances by Il Postino Pat, the Self-Righteous Brothers and Kevin the Teenager.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike and Alison welcome the very first guests to their new bijoux B&B, determined to get a glowing review, whatever the cost. While serving the couple breakfast, Alison realises that they are not enjoying their anniversary break and, fearing a bad review, utilises the surprising skills of Lady Button and Julian to ensure the couple make the most of their weekend away. Mary reveals she has never had a holiday, so Pat tells her about the joys and pitfalls of week on the Costa Del Sol.

programme.title: Men Behaving Badly
programme.desc: Why has Deborah agreed to spend the night with Tony? Why has Gary painted Dorothy's record green? And who was it that died in the tragic canoeing accident?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Richard Osman and Sara Pascoe team up on Galaga and Micro Machines.

programme.title: Dara O Briain's Go 8 Bit
programme.desc: Rob Beckett and Zoe Lyons each grab a joystick and do battle on Gran Turismo, Horace Goes Skiing - and Goat Simulator.

programme.title: Judge Romesh
programme.desc: Paul Danan finally gets his day in court with Shaun Williamson after a pantomime-based fallout, while a husband is sick and tired of his miserly wife ruining Christmas.

programme.title: How To Catch A Serial Killer

programme.title: Wagspiracy: Vardy v Rooney
programme.desc: In 2019, 'Wagatha Christie' gripped Britain as Coleen Rooney accused Rebekah Vardy of leaking stories about her to the tabloid press. Despite huge media attention on this social media scandal, and a trial that ended up in the high-court in the summer of 2022, with Rooney emerging victorious, the inside story of how and why this extraordinary moment in British culture came to pass, has never fully been told - until now.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: Contestants must choose one of three ingredients that have inspired the judges during their childhood, including Andy's Vegemite, Mel's cumquats or Jock's panettone.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Dudley, a man collapses while playing bingo two days before his wedding. Meanwhile, in Stoke, the crew are called out to help an elderly man who has had an unexplained fall.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Jordan Hutchison is an inspirational teenager. He has cerebral palsy and epilepsy, but this has not stopped him defying expectations and raising huge sums of money for charity. He currently lives with his parents, Jackie and Colin, and his siblings at his grandmother's house. He sleeps on an air bed, while the parents share rooms with the younger children. The family home is a shell after a series of building issues meant the family ran out of money with no way of finishing the work.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Mike spent his life savings on home improvements so his sons could come and visit, but was left in the lurch by rogue builders who destroyed his house, leaving him depressed and desperate, reliant on internet forums for contact with the outside world. With the help of local trades, family, friends and Mike's online community, Nick Knowles and the team spend nine days turning Mike's wreck of a home into a house fit for the future.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team recruit help from the local community to renovate a house and change a family's lives. Shaun spent over a year building an extension onto the house where his children lived with their mother. He wanted to give them a home in which they could grow, but sadly he died before he could finish the build. Shaun's best friend wrote in to see whether the team could help finish the extension.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A French bulldog has an exploded disc and faces a high-risk operation. A cat called called Nutty has a shattered radius after being shot with an airgun.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Gentle giant Bear, an English mastiff, visits Noel after suffering a painful ruptured cruciate ligament in his knee. Siamese cat Bluebell is rushed in after being hit by a car. Alongside a fractured pelvis, Noel suspects possible nerve damage.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Coco, Sapphire and the Cheese Chis
programme.desc: Pete helps rescue six Chihuahuas from the home of a hoarder and witnesses the emotional handover of a pregnant pug and her sister.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.sub-title: Nugget, Tetley and the Police Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets Chow Chow Nugget who has a longer stay than planned, three-legged Tetley, and some Belgian Malinois puppies training to be service dogs.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete meets Keira, a dog on the brink of starvation, and gentle old Jack Russell Paige, whose owner had to make the heartbreaking decision to give her up after 15 years.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike are trying to find a semi-harmonious routine with the ghostly housemates of Button House. The ghosts have found a way to make their new situation work for them, while the couple are working towards a new money-making venture to fund their perpetual renovations. Without the money to continue the extensive building work, and with the hotel still a distant dream, Alison and Mike decide to try to rent the place out for events.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: After a heavy night partying, Alison and Mike wake to find their house in disarray. With the clock ticking until a potentially crucial business partner comes to view the venue, and with very sore heads, the couple attempt a mass clean up. The ghosts are all acting very strangely, and Alison struggles to piece together the events of the night before to figure out what happened to them, whilst she's tasked with finding something precious to Lady Button before she realises it's missing.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike grapple with the latest obstacle to nailing down an event booking, but they're stymied by the Captain's past coming back to haunt him.

programme.title: Aaron Hernandez Uncovered
programme.desc: The untold true story of NFL superstar Aaron Hernandez from the viewpoint of those who knew him best strips away the layers to answer the many questions left behind after Hernandez's tragic death.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with global popstar Rita Ora. After being plucked from obscurity by Jay-Z's Roc Nation label, Rita has gone on to forge a career as an all-round entertainer, embracing acting roles, lucrative advertising contracts and stints as a TV talent show judge, all while racking up more top ten hits than any other British female singer.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a 67-year-old who has a lung condition and can't breathe. Plus, the crews assist a 53-year-old who has ended up having several seizures.

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: After travelling over 20,000 miles, HMS Queen Elizabeth heads from Japan back to Guam for vital maintenance. The ship and her escorts sail in convoy with the American, Japanese and Australian navies for a show of strength in China's backyard.

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty
programme.desc: After six months at sea on her first operational deployment, HMS Queen Elizabeth departs the Pacific for the long voyage home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A 1971 Mercedes SL and a 1989 Jaguar XJS emerge from a barn on a chicken farm, a Roller and a Rover go under the hammer and a 1966 Triumph Spitfire is restored to near perfection.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek takes a shine to a rare 1958 Armstrong Siddeley Sapphire with a long family history and a convertible Triumph Herald brings a few smiles on auction day.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce is in Normandy for a special edition of the roadshow to commemorate the 80th anniversary of the D-Day landings in June 1944. Filmed in Normandy and at the D-Day Museum in Portsmouth, the team hear eyewitness accounts from the time.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team arrive at Brooklands Motor Racing and Aviation Museum, near Weybridge in Surrey. Thousands flock to the paddocks, where the experts are on duty. Amongst the objects exciting their interest are a risque bust found abandoned in a garden, rare artefacts recording the Bluebird attempts to break world speed records, an old chest given away on the internet and valuable aboriginal tools.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the Brooklands Motor Racing and Aviation Museum near Weybridge for another busy day of valuations. Objects brought before the cameras include a rare and highly valuable stirrup cup, books once owned by Churchill and rescued from a garden fire, and a remarkable bracelet given to Queen Victoria that was found in a gutter. Plus Fiona welcomes the return of a friendly Roadshow face.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up an impressive five vehicle haul from a collector who can no longer look after his motors. Paul's out on the road too - he's collecting a rare 1972 Lancia Fulvia Berlina.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave picks up a 1970s Alfa Romeo that once starred in a chocolate advert. Meanwhile, Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV before becoming distracted by a treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming begins his 300-mile boating adventure across the north of England and the Midlands. programme.desc: Robbie Cumming tackles the fast-flowing tidal River Trent and is invited to join a night-time illuminated boat parade. However, his journey is hampered by a damaged wall in Worksop and a water shortage on the picturesque Chesterfield Canal.
